executable.title: Otsu Multi-level Segmentation
executable.description: Segment a volume into N intensity bins via Otsu's multi-thresholding. Emits a .seg.nrrd labelmap whose per-label names and RGB colors travel inside the file. Backed by ITK.

image.name: inputVolume
image.label: Input Volume
image.description: Input volume (DICOM, NIfTI, NRRD, MHA, etc.)

image.name: outputLabelmap
image.label: Output Labelmap
image.description: Multi-label segmentation (.seg.nrrd) with embedded per-label names and colors.

integer.name: numberOfLevels
integer.label: Number of levels
integer.description: How many foreground labels to produce. Otsu picks N thresholds; you get N+1 bins (including background).

parameters.label: Girder API
parameters.description: Server access injected by slicer_cli_web for v1 b3 feeding; not shown to users.
